files.path: I’m a product leader and want to know what to buil.md
files.reason: Architectural spine. Canonical for 5-primitive stack, roadmap horizons, UX rules, and agent-readiness scorecard. Tier-1 specifics throughout; non-overlapping framework (passes strict keep gate).

files.path: Steps to launch a SaaS tool monetized by agent mic.md
files.reason: Sole source for the agent-micropayments SaaS lane. Concrete 10-step procedure with unique tactics not covered elsewhere. Passes strict keep gate (unique tactic set).

files.path: What data and systems do retail AI agents need to.md
files.reason: Different abstraction level than the 5-primitive stack: 7-item operational build checklist. Passes strict keep gate (materially better version of 'what to build day-one'). After dedup pass, kept as a distinct playbook section (Minimum Data Stack) rather than merged into 5-primitive stack.

files.path: “We’re still going to be influenced by the people.md
files.reason: 10 ranked Claude-SDK wedge ideas — only this file provides them. Passes strict keep gate (unique tactic set). The Tobi Lütke quote intro and closing Q&A prompts discarded. After dedup pass, file 2's 5 Claude-SDK ideas (also a wedge list) were folded in here as the canonical source.

files.path: _archive/Alibaba (9988.HK) is preparing to unveil the integ.md
files.reason: Single-vendor news article. Did not pass strict keep gate as standalone source (its concrete facts are vendor-specific, not actionable). Two non-overlapping framings (China-vs-West integrated-stack vs protocol-play, agent-for-human → agent-for-agent gap) were extracted as 1–2 sentence bullets in the Strategic Frames section.

files.path: _archive/Examples of AI personal shoppers like OpenAI Opera.md
files.reason: Short overview. Its 5 Claude SDK product ideas are fully covered by the 10 ranked ideas in the larger 'We're still going to be influenced' file. Strict keep gate: no unique tactic, no non-overlapping framework, not a materially better version. Dedup pass merges into build-wedges.

files.path: _archive/What are top use cases for AI agents in retail 202.md
files.reason: Generic 'top use cases' overview. Every use case named (personal shopping, customer support, inventory forecasting, merchandising, agentic checkout) is more concretely stated elsewhere. Fails strict keep gate.

files.path: _archive/What does this mean for agent-agent commerce in 20.md
files.reason: Mostly futurism. Three framings (power shifts to back-end execution, pricing pressure from buyer agents, rendezvous-point concentration) extracted as 1-line bullets in Strategic Frames. The bulk of the file is consensus restatement and forward-looking speculation.

notes: Iteration 2 changes applied: operator-first format (Rule/Execution/Example/Edge-case scaffolding on tactic and framework sections), strict keep gate, in-playbook dedup pass (file 2's 5 wedges merged into file 8's 10-wedge ranking; 3 strategic framings from archived files folded as 1-liners in Strategic Frames), contribution_type field on each file entry, size guard (6.9 KB < 8 KB band).
